title.en: The first god is the main way.

content.en:
meeting.

The First Divine Lord of the Protoss said with a solemn face: "All of you of the Demon Race, I think you should also know about the fact that those Supremes of the Twelve Universe Era have been frantically collecting Innate Treasures recently, right? With the amount they bought, the price of their losses was too great for even us Protoss to bear, but they didn't care. Not long ago, our Protoss also made a deal with each other, but there were not many transactions, just a trial. You demons should have traded with those Supremes of the Twelve Universe Eras, right?"

"Yes, we also traded, but our demon clan does not lack any resources, and we only traded a little innate treasure, and we dare not trade too much, lest they have other purposes. But it's useless to do this, too many cosmic clans have traded with them!"

"First Demon Lord, what do you think is the purpose of the Supreme Beings of the Twelve Universe Era in acquiring so many Innate Treasures?" asked the First Demon Lord.

"I don't know!" the First Demon Lord shook his head, "But they won't make a loss-making deal, the Innate Supreme Treasure must be very important to them, even to the point of doing whatever it takes." In our eyes, there is no difference between the innate treasure and the acquired treasure, they are just weapons to assist in battle. But in the eyes of those Supreme Beings of the Twelve Universe Eras, there may be other uses!"

"First Demon Lord, are we just waiting, if they have any plans, even if they are not good for us, when they complete their plans, then it will be too late!"

"I can't wait, unless I catch a Supreme and interrogate it. But those Supremes are too powerful, unless we join forces, we can capture one of the weaker Supremes among them. But in this way, it is tantamount to a war, and if they support quickly, maybe we will all fall and die. The First Demon Lord said helplessly.

"Then we have to wait!"

The first god is the main way.

"However, we also need to pay close attention to the movements of those supreme beings in the Twelve Universe Eras, and once there is a change, we will immediately mobilize them. In addition, we also need to be in close contact with the supremes of other races, and attack all of them at any time, I always feel that the Twelve Universe Era is not a simple plan!" the First Demon Lord said in a deep voice.

"That's nature!"

The first god answered.

......

In a flash, a thousand years have passed.

Those supreme beings of the Twelve Universe Eras, plus the sons of those eras, and the Supreme Highnesses have collected a large number of innate supreme treasures, and it can even be said that thirty percent of the innate supreme treasures of the universe have fallen into their hands.

Of course, they also paid an even greater price, almost consuming a lot of the previous accumulation.

The other side.

Ye Tian had been in retreat for thousands of years, and he had basically exhausted many of the resources he had obtained in the chaotic small world, and finally raised his cultivation to the peak realm of the cosmic god.

In addition to this, he also cultivated the thirteenth set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Formulas to the perfection realm, and began to involve the fourteenth set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Formulas.

It is worth mentioning that Ye Tian finally practiced the second form of Tiangang's battle method.

The Tiangang Battle Method is an innumerable secret technique created by the transcendent Yuntan Heavenly Monarch, and the first form alone is very amazing, it can comprehensively increase the combat power by six times, and the second form is even more difficult to cultivate.

It is only now that he has practiced the second form.

The power of the second form of Tiangang's combat method is even more terrifying, it can increase the combat power by eight times, which seems to be only a little more powerful than the first type, but at his current level, the increase in combat power at every point is very terrifying, not to mention the overall increase!

Of course, Ye Tian had too many aspects to improve, after all, he had only broken through to the Universe God for a long time, and his accumulation was far from enough, and he was still too far from impacting the Domination Realm.

However, Ye Tian did not continue the retreat, but chose to go out.

He needed to know about the current development of Tiange, as well as the situation in the outside world.

Ye Tian found Ye Yu for the first time and learned about the development of today's pavilion.

Similar to what he had predicted, the Heavenly Pavilion had grown steadily, and the Heavenly Pavilion Chamber of Commerce had been established, spread all over the Holy Domain, and the business was getting bigger and bigger, and more and more elites were being sent to the Heavenly Pavilion.

As for the situation in the outside world, nothing has changed much.

What Ye Tian wanted to know was the affairs of those forces in the Twelve Universe Eras, but the Heavenly Pavilion level was too low, and he couldn't reach such a high-level level, so he couldn't learn about it from the Heavenly Pavilion.

And Ye Tian didn't want to trouble the Kunwu Supreme, so he asked the Bright Moon Fairy of the Heavenly Pavilion to ask her ancestor Flame Heavenly Venerable about the news.

Soon, news of the Twelve Cosmic Epochs arrived.

......

"Those forces of the Twelve Universe Epochs are collecting Innate Treasures?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

If it is a normal collection of innate treasures, it is nothing, the key is that those supremes of the twelve universe epochs acquire innate treasures at a price of several times, which makes people think deeply.

There must be something wrong behind this incident!

Moreover, Ye Tian felt that the universe would soon have great changes, and it might even have something to do with the Innate Supreme Treasure.

"I can only wait, I hope it doesn't happen too badly!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

------------

Yuangu Palace.

Since the forces of the Twelve Cosmic Epochs occupied 100 star fields, the Lord of the Yuan Gu moved the Yuan Gu Hall to one of the star fields, and the Yuan Gu Hall served as the station of the First Cosmic Era, and the Yuan Gu Lord has always lived here.

this day.

The supremes of other cosmic eras gathered in the Yuan Gu Hall one after another, led by the Lord of the Yuan Gu, obeying the orders of the Lord of the Yuan Gu, and a large number of formations were spread around it.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu is not the most powerful of these supremes, he can only be regarded as one of the strongest supremes, there are several supremes whose strength is equal to him, but the position of the Lord of the Yuan Gu is even more transcendent, because he is the person in charge of the entire plan.

Therefore, the other Supremes all obeyed the orders of the Lord of the Yuan Gu and started their plans with the Yuan Gu Hall as the core place.

At this time, there were a large number of innate treasures in the Yuan Gu Palace, all of which were all the innate treasures they had collected over the years, and their number had reached a terrifying level.

And now, these innate treasures are placed on a huge altar like garbage.

"Have all the Supremes arrived?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu asked.

"It's all here!" Jin Guang Supreme said: "Moreover, those sons of the era and their Supreme Highnesses have basically arrived, just waiting for the Lord of the Yuan Gu to give your order!"

"The formation has also been arranged, even if the Supreme of the Ten Thousand Clans comes to make trouble at this time, it will be able to delay a little time, besides, they will snoop at most, and they will not dare to make a move, so it is foolproof!" said another Supreme.

"Very well, let's get started!"

The main road of the Yuangu.
